arts.sum: Atletico Madrid have lost just once in La Liga since 27th October, but their strong form still isn't enough to climb above Barcelona and Real Madrid. It's tight at the top of the table, with Barcelona...

arts.ttl: Champions League draw LIVE: Arsenal, Liverpool and Aston Villa learn last-16 opponents and route to the final
arts.sum: The three Premier League sides will learn who they face in the round of 16, as well as their potential opponents in the quarter-finals and semi-finals

arts.ttl: Atletico Madrid begin search for summer priority amid doubts about starter
arts.sum: Atletico Madrid have on a number of occasions been described as the side with the most depth in La Liga this season, with Diego Simeone having a number of alternatives and differing profiles to call on. Not least La Liga’s second-top scorer last season, Alexander Sorloth, who despite strong form has been kept to a […] The post Atletico Madrid begin search for summer priority amid doubts about starter appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Atletico Madrid have hope of resurrecting failed 2024 transfer
arts.sum: Atletico Madrid had a very busy summer transfer window in 2024, with several big-name signings having arrived at the Metropolitano. Conor Gallagher was one of those, although a deal with Chelsea proved to be very difficult to do. Atleti had an agreement in place with Chelsea earlier in the summer, but after Samu Omorodion pulled […] The post Atletico Madrid have hope of resurrecting failed 2024 transfer appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Preview: Valencia vs. Atletico Madrid - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's La Liga clash between Valencia and Atletico Madrid, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
